title: New community center opens in partnership with local church
description: A new gathering space brings together over 200 families in the heart of the community...
body:
After more than two years of prayer, planning, and partnership, Alta Gracia Missions is thrilled to announce the official opening of a new community center in the heart of one of the most underserved barangays in Cebu. The ribbon-cutting ceremony was attended by over 200 families, local church leaders, and a team of volunteers who helped build and furnish the space from the ground up.

## A Gathering Place Born from Faith
The center was made possible through a collaboration between Alta Gracia Missions and **Grace Covenant Church**, a local congregation that has been serving its neighborhood for over a decade. Together, both organizations raised funds, coordinated construction crews, and mobilized more than 80 volunteers across six weekends to complete the project.

> "We have been praying for a space like this for years. Now our children have somewhere safe to learn, play, and grow in faith — and our community finally has a home." — Pastor Emmanuel Reyes, Grace Covenant Church

## What the Center Offers
The 2,400 square-foot facility is designed to serve as a multipurpose hub for the community, offering:
- After-school tutoring and literacy programs for children ages 6–16
- Weekly feeding programs for families facing food insecurity
- Vocational skills training for young adults and mothers
- Sunday worship gatherings and midweek Bible studies
- Emergency relief distribution during typhoon season

## The Journey Behind the Walls
The road to this opening was not without challenges. Funding shortfalls, permitting delays, and the logistics of coordinating international volunteers tested the resolve of everyone involved. But through generous giving from supporters like you and the tireless work of our local partners, what once seemed impossible became a reality.

This center is more than a building — it is a declaration that these families are seen, valued, and deeply loved. As we look ahead, we are already planning expanded programming and a second phase of construction to add additional classroom space.

**Thank you** to every donor, prayer partner, and volunteer who made this possible. Your generosity is literally changing the landscape of this community — one family at a time.
